features.name: dynamic array randomization with variable size constraint
features.description: Code should include a rand dynamic array (dynarr[]) with a size constraint using a variable (dynarr.size < xyz) in a class

features.name: dynamic array element constraint with indexing
features.description: Code should include a rand dynamic array with an element-level constraint using array indexing (dynarr[0] > 100)

features.name: combined size and element constraints on dynamic array
features.description: Code should include a rand dynamic array with both size constraints (dynarr.size) and element constraints (dynarr[0]) in the same constraint block
